label: L1
description: Localized tumor that does not involve any vital structures; Tumor confined within one body compartment; No evidence of image-defined risk factors; Intraspinal tumor extension that does not fulfil the criteria for an IDRF is consistent with stage (L1)

label: L2
description: Locoregional tumor with evidence of image-defined risk factors; Tumor ipsilaterally contiguous within body compartments; Non-contiguous disease would be coded as M

label: M
description: Distant metastatic disease; Noncontiguous disease; Distant lymph node involvement

label: MS
description: For patients less than 18 months only metastatic disease confined to bone marrow, skin, liver

label: not applicable
description: Information not collected for this case

label: unknown
description: Not documented in medical record; International Neuroblastoma Risk Group Staging System not assessed; Death certificate only
